tierSelect.title: Intelligence Layers Tour
tierSelect.subtitle: Explore FlowOne.Pro through its intelligence layers. Each tour covers a different dimension of the platform with interactive animations.

beginner.title: Operations Intelligence
beginner.description: Your agency nervous system: email, calendar, search, contacts, tasks, and security. The foundation that keeps everything connected.

intermediate.title: Delivery Intelligence
intermediate.description: Margin protection tools: project boards, team chat, cloud drive, video calls, moodboards, time tracking, and workload management.

advanced.title: Revenue & Client Intelligence
advanced.description: Financial command and retention control: CRM pipeline, client portal, invoicing, forecasting, automations, sequences, and campaigns.

email.title: Your Inbox
email.detail: All your emails in one place. Unread messages are highlighted with a blue indicator. Click any email to read, reply, or forward it. Star important messages to find them later.

compose.title: Compose & Reply
compose.detail: Write new emails with a rich text editor. Attach files from your computer or Drive. Use templates for common messages. Schedule emails to send later.

threads.title: Conversation Threads
threads.detail: Replies are grouped into threads automatically so you can follow the full discussion. See who said what and when, all in one view.

labels.title: Color Labels
labels.detail: Organize emails with colored labels like Work, Personal, or Important. Apply multiple labels to one email. Click a label in the sidebar to see all matching messages.

filters.title: Smart Filters
filters.detail: Create rules that automatically sort incoming email. For example: emails from {'@'}company.com automatically get the Work label. Set up once, works forever.

accounts.title: Multiple Accounts
accounts.detail: Connect Gmail, Outlook, or any IMAP account. Switch between accounts with one click, or see everything in a unified inbox.

contacts.title: Contact Book
contacts.detail: People you email are automatically saved as contacts. View their email history, add notes, and organize them into groups.

tasks.title: Quick Tasks from Email
tasks.detail: Select any text in an email and turn it into a task with one click. Tasks appear in your task panel with the email linked. Set due dates and reminders.

search.title: Universal Search
search.detail: Search across everything: emails, files, tasks, contacts, and calendar events. Type a keyword and results from every part of the platform appear instantly.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.detail: Integrated calendar with Google and Outlook sync. Create events, set reminders, and invite people. Dates in emails are auto-detected and suggested as events.

security.title: Account Security
security.detail: Protect your account with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA). Use an authenticator app for extra security. Manage trusted devices and active sessions.

welcome.title: Getting Started with Email
welcome.description: This tour walks you through the email platform basics. You will learn how to receive, send, and organize emails, plus powerful features that save you time every day.

email.title: Your Inbox
email.description: What: This is where all your emails arrive. New messages appear at the top with a blue indicator. Why: A clean, organized inbox helps you stay on top of communication. Where: Open the Inbox from the sidebar to see all incoming mail.

compose.title: Writing & Sending Email
compose.description: What: Click the compose button to write a new email. Add recipients, a subject, your message, and attach files. Why: Fast, reliable email composition is the core of daily work. Where: The compose button is always available in the top-left corner.

threads.title: Conversation Threads
threads.description: What: Replies to the same email are grouped into a single thread. Why: You can follow the full discussion without searching for individual messages. Where: Click any email in the inbox to expand its thread.

organize.title: Labels & Filters
organize.description: What: Colored labels categorize your emails; filter rules auto-sort incoming mail. Why: Stay organized without manual effort -- emails from your team can auto-label as Work. Where: Manage labels and filters from the sidebar and Settings.

accounts.title: Multiple Email Accounts
accounts.description: What: Connect Gmail, Outlook, or any IMAP account to manage all email in one place. Why: No more switching between apps -- everything lives in a single unified inbox. Where: Add accounts in Settings > Accounts.

contacts.title: Your Contacts
contacts.description: What: People you email are automatically saved as contacts with their history. Why: Quickly find anyone you have communicated with and see past conversations. Where: Open the Contacts panel from the sidebar.

tasks.title: Quick Tasks from Email
tasks.description: What: Select text in an email and create a task instantly with one click. Why: Turn action items into trackable tasks without leaving the email. Where: Highlight text, then click the task icon in the selection toolbar.

search.title: Find Anything Instantly
search.description: What: The universal search finds emails, files, tasks, contacts, and calendar events. Why: One search bar replaces browsing through folders and tabs. Where: Press Ctrl+K or click the search bar at the top of the screen.

calendar.title: Integrated Calendar
calendar.description: What: A full calendar that syncs with Google Calendar and Outlook. Why: Dates mentioned in emails are auto-detected and suggested as events. Where: Open Calendar from the sidebar or click a detected date in an email.

security.title: Keeping Your Account Safe
security.description: What: Two-Factor Authentication adds an extra security layer using an authenticator app. Why: Even if someone learns your password, they cannot access your account. Where: Enable 2FA in Settings > Security.

summary.title: You Know the Basics!
summary.description: You have learned how to receive, send, and organize email, manage contacts, create tasks, search across everything, use the calendar, and secure your account. Ready to test your knowledge?

q1.question: What does the blue indicator on an email mean?

q2.question: How do you start writing a new email?

q3.question: What happens when someone replies to your email?
options: It becomes a conversation thread grouped together
You receive a phone notification only

q4.question: Which of these is NOT a way to organize your emails?

q5.question: What do email filters do?
options: Automatically sort incoming mail based on rules you set

q6.question: You have a Gmail and an Outlook account. Can you use both in this platform?
options: No, only one account is allowed
Yes, connect multiple IMAP accounts and switch with one click
Yes, but you need separate logins for each

q7.question: Where do your contacts come from?
options: You must import them from a CSV file
They are automatically saved from people you email
They are downloaded from social media
You must type each one manually

q8.question: How do you turn an email into a task?
options: Forward it to a special email address
Print the email and write it on a note
Select text in the email and click to create a task
Tasks cannot be created from emails

q9.question: What can the universal search bar find?
options: Emails, files, tasks, contacts, and calendar events

q10.question: Your calendar can sync with which services?

q11.question: What is Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)?
options: An extra security step using an authenticator app
A backup password stored on paper
Logging in twice with the same password

q12.question: What happens when you star an email?
options: It is forwarded to your manager
It is marked as important for easy access later
It moves to the spam folder

boards.title: Kanban Boards
boards.detail: Drag-and-drop project boards with columns, cards, checklists, milestones, deadlines, labels, and attachments. Assign tasks to team members and track progress visually.

chat.title: Team Chat
chat.detail: Real-time messaging with channels for teams, direct messages, threads for focused discussions, emoji reactions, and file sharing.

drive.title: Cloud Drive & Docs
drive.detail: Store, share, and collaborate on files with version history. Built-in document editor. Every file can be linked to projects and clients.

video.title: Video Calls
video.detail: Start video calls with screen sharing directly from chat or client profiles. Record meetings, toggle camera, and invite multiple participants.

huddles.title: Quick Huddles
huddles.detail: Start instant audio calls from any chat channel. No scheduling needed -- just click huddle for a quick voice conversation with your team.

moodboards.title: Visual Moodboards
moodboards.detail: Infinite canvas for creative projects. Add images, text, shapes, and connections with animated lines. Present ideas to clients with built-in presenter mode.

colleagues.title: Team Directory
colleagues.detail: Browse your organization's team members. See departments, roles, contact info, and availability. Quickly start conversations or calls from any profile.

tracking.title: Email Tracking
tracking.detail: Know when your emails are opened. Read receipts show exactly when recipients view your messages. Track link clicks in sent emails.

reactions.title: Email Reactions
reactions.detail: React to emails with emoji -- like thumbs up or heart. Quick acknowledgment without writing a full reply. Compatible with Gmail and Outlook.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.detail: Get AI-powered email summaries, smart compose suggestions, and automated categorization. Save time with intelligent writing assistance.

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.detail: Create reusable email templates for common messages. Insert with one click when composing. Share templates with your entire team.

welcome.title: Team Collaboration Tools
welcome.description: This tour covers the tools your team uses to collaborate: project boards, real-time chat, shared files, video calls, and creative moodboards -- all built into your email platform.

boards.title: Kanban Boards
boards.description: What: Drag-and-drop boards with columns, cards, checklists, and deadlines. Why: Visualize project progress and keep your team aligned on priorities. Where: Create a new board from the sidebar under Projects.

chat.title: Team Chat
chat.description: What: Real-time channels, direct messages, threads, reactions, and file sharing. Why: Keep conversations in context without switching to a separate app. Where: Open Chat from the sidebar to see your channels.

drive.title: Cloud Drive & Docs
drive.description: What: File storage with a built-in document editor and version history. Why: Collaborate on files without emailing attachments back and forth. Where: Access Drive from the sidebar; link files to projects and clients.

video.title: Video Calls
video.description: What: Video calls with screen sharing, recording, and multi-participant support. Why: Face-to-face meetings without leaving the platform. Where: Start a call from any chat channel or client profile.

huddles.title: Quick Huddles
huddles.description: What: Instant audio calls from any chat channel -- no scheduling required. Why: Sometimes a quick voice chat resolves things faster than typing. Where: Click the headphone icon in any chat channel header.

moodboards.title: Visual Moodboards
moodboards.description: What: An infinite canvas for images, text, shapes, and animated connections. Why: Present creative ideas visually to your team or clients. Where: Create a Moodboard from the sidebar under Projects.

colleagues.title: Team Directory
colleagues.description: What: Browse team members with their roles, departments, and availability. Why: Quickly find the right person and start a conversation or call. Where: Open Colleagues from the sidebar.

tracking.title: Email Tracking
tracking.description: What: Read receipts and link-click tracking for sent emails. Why: Know exactly when recipients open your email so you can follow up at the right time. Where: Tracking info appears automatically on sent emails.

reactions.title: Email Reactions
reactions.description: What: React to emails with emoji like thumbs up or heart. Why: Acknowledge messages quickly without writing a full reply. Where: Hover over any email and click the reaction icon.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.description: What: AI-powered email summaries, smart compose, and auto-categorization. Why: Save time on repetitive writing and quickly understand long threads. Where: The AI panel appears in the compose window and email view.

templates.title: Email Templates
templates.description: What: Reusable message templates you insert with one click. Why: Stop rewriting the same email over and over. Where: Access templates from the compose toolbar or Settings.

summary.title: Team Ready!
summary.description: You now know how to collaborate with your team using boards, chat, drive, video, and more. Ready for a quick knowledge check?

q1.question: What is a Kanban board used for?
options: Visually organizing projects with drag-and-drop columns and cards

q2.question: How do you start a quick voice call without scheduling?
options: Click the Huddle button in any chat channel
Call through an external phone app
Write an email requesting a call

q3.question: Which of these can you do in Team Chat?
options: Send messages, share files, react with emoji, and use threads
Only see online status of colleagues

q4.question: What makes the Drive different from a basic file storage?
options: It includes a document editor, version history, and links files to projects
It only works with PDF files

q5.question: During a video call, which of these is NOT possible?

q6.question: What are Moodboards best suited for?
options: Creative visual projects with images, text, and shapes on an infinite canvas

q7.question: Where can you find information about your team members' roles and departments?
options: In the Team Directory / Colleagues section

q8.question: What does email tracking tell you?
options: How many words are in your email
When recipients open your email and click links
The spam score of your email
How fast your internet connection is

q9.question: You want to quickly acknowledge an email without writing a full reply. What do you use?
options: React with an emoji (like thumbs up)

q10.question: What can the AI Assistant help you with?
options: Only translating emails to other languages
Email summaries, smart compose suggestions, and auto-categorization

q11.question: How do email templates save you time?
options: They automatically reply to every email
They provide reusable message formats you insert with one click

q12.question: A client asks for a project update. Which tools could you combine?
options: Board progress, Drive files, and a Moodboard presentation

crmClient.title: Automatic CRM Clients
crmClient.detail: New contacts are auto-created as CRM client profiles from incoming emails. Tracks email history, financials, time spent, linked boards, and files per client.
crmClient.connects: Connects to: Portal, Pipelines, Time Tracking, Campaigns

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.detail: Give clients their own portal to view project progress, approve deliverables, sign documents, and communicate. White-label branding available.

pipelines.title: Sales Pipelines
pipelines.detail: Track deals from lead to close with visual pipeline stages. Set deal values, assign owners, forecast revenue, and link everything to CRM clients.

automations.title: CRM Automations
automations.detail: Trigger actions automatically: when a deal moves stage, a client is created, or custom conditions are met. Send emails, create tasks, update fields.

boardAuto.title: Board Automations
boardAuto.detail: Automate your project boards: auto-move cards, assign members, set due dates, and send notifications based on triggers like status changes.

sequences.title: Email Sequences
sequences.detail: Schedule multi-step email follow-ups with delays, stop conditions, and personalization tokens. Perfect for sales outreach and client nurturing.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.detail: Built-in timer that records hours per task, board, and client. Start/stop with one click or log manually. Feeds directly into reports and invoices.

clientReport.title: Client Reports
clientReport.detail: Auto-generated reports per client: tasks completed, time spent, milestones reached, project progress. Share via client portal or export as PDF.

invoice.title: Invoicing
invoice.detail: Turn tracked time into invoices. Integrates with Billingo and Szamlazz.hu for PDF generation, automated sending, and payment tracking.

campaigns.title: Email Campaigns
campaigns.detail: Design and send mass campaigns with templates. Track opens, clicks, bounces. Build mailing lists, segment audiences, and A/B test subject lines.

dashboard.title: Executive Dashboard
dashboard.detail: Bird's-eye view of your business: revenue, pipeline value, team utilization, project progress, and financial forecasts all in one place.

welcome.title: Business & CRM Power Tools
welcome.description: This tour covers the business features: automatic client management, sales pipelines, invoicing, automations, email campaigns, and executive dashboards -- everything you need to run your business.

crmClient.title: Automatic CRM Clients
crmClient.description: What: New contacts are auto-created as CRM profiles from incoming emails. Why: Every client interaction is tracked without manual data entry. Where: Open the CRM panel from the sidebar to browse all clients.

portal.title: Client Portal
portal.description: What: A dedicated portal where clients view progress, approve deliverables, and sign documents. Why: Professional client communication without extra tools. Where: Enable the portal per client from their CRM profile.

pipelines.title: Sales Pipelines
pipelines.description: What: Visual deal tracking with stages from lead to close, deal values, and owners. Why: Forecast revenue and never lose track of a deal. Where: Open Pipelines from the sidebar under CRM.

automations.title: CRM Automations
automations.description: What: Rules that fire automatically when a deal changes stage or a client is created. Why: Eliminate repetitive tasks like sending welcome emails or creating boards. Where: Set up automations in CRM > Automations.

boardAuto.title: Board Automations
boardAuto.description: What: Auto-move cards, assign members, set dates, and notify on triggers. Why: Keep project boards up to date without manual card shuffling. Where: Configure rules in Board Settings > Automations.

sequences.title: Email Sequences
sequences.description: What: Multi-step scheduled follow-ups with delays, stop conditions, and personalization. Why: Consistent outreach without remembering to send each email manually. Where: Create sequences in CRM > Sequences.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.description: What: A built-in timer that records hours per task, board, and client. Why: Accurate time data feeds directly into reports and invoices. Where: Click the timer icon on any task or board card.

clientReport.title: Client Reports
clientReport.description: What: Auto-generated reports showing tasks completed, time spent, and milestones. Why: Keep clients informed with zero manual reporting effort. Where: Generate reports from a client's CRM profile.

invoice.title: Invoicing
invoice.description: What: Turn tracked time into invoices with Billingo and Szamlazz.hu integration. Why: Bill clients accurately and get paid faster. Where: Create invoices from CRM > Invoices or from a client report.

campaigns.title: Email Campaigns
campaigns.description: What: Mass email campaigns with templates, audience segments, and A/B testing. Why: Reach your audience at scale with tracked engagement. Where: Open Campaigns from the sidebar.

dashboard.title: Executive Dashboard
dashboard.description: What: A bird's-eye view of revenue, pipeline, utilization, and project health. Why: Make informed decisions with real-time business metrics. Where: The Dashboard is the default CRM landing page.

summary.title: Business Master!
summary.description: You have explored the complete business toolkit: CRM, pipelines, invoicing, automations, and campaigns. Ready for the advanced quiz?

q1.question: How are CRM client profiles created in the platform?
options: You must create each client manually
Automatically from incoming emails with new contacts
By importing a spreadsheet once a month
They are synced from social media profiles

q2.question: What can a client do through their Client Portal?
options: Access the admin settings of the platform
View project progress, approve deliverables, and sign documents

q3.question: A deal moves from 'Qualified Lead' to 'Proposal Sent'. Where does this happen?
options: In the Sales Pipeline with visual drag-and-drop stages
In the calendar as a scheduled event

q4.question: Which scenario would trigger a CRM automation?
options: A deal moving to a new stage, a new client being created, or a custom condition

q5.question: What is the difference between CRM Automations and Board Automations?
options: There is no difference, they are the same thing
CRM automations handle deals and clients; Board automations handle project cards and tasks

q6.question: What are Email Sequences best used for?
options: Multi-step scheduled follow-up emails with delays and stop conditions

q7.question: You tracked 12 hours on a client project this week. What can you do next?
options: Nothing, the hours are just for your records
Generate an invoice directly from the tracked time
Only export as a text file
Send the hours via chat message

q8.question: What does a Client Report include?
options: Only the number of emails exchanged
Tasks completed, time spent, milestones reached, and project progress
A list of all platform users

q9.question: Which invoicing providers does the platform integrate with?

q10.question: You want to see your business health at a glance -- revenue, pipeline value, and team utilization. Where do you go?

q11.question: What can you track in an Email Campaign?
options: Only the number of emails sent
Opens, clicks, bounces, and you can A/B test subject lines

q12.question: What is the complete business workflow starting from a new email?
options: Email > CRM Client > Tasks > Time Tracking > Report > Invoice

email.title: Email Inbox
email.detail: Full IMAP client with multi-account support, smart filters, labels, threaded conversations, and powerful universal search. Supports Gmail, Outlook, and any IMAP server.

conversations.title: Conversations & Notifications
conversations.detail: Emails are auto-grouped into threads. Real-time push notifications for new messages, replies, mentions, and platform events.
conversations.connects: Connects to: CRM Client, Video, Moodboards

crmClient.title: Automatic CRM Clients
crmClient.detail: New contacts are auto-created as CRM client profiles from incoming emails. Tracks email history, financials, time spent, linked boards, and files per client.

tasksBoards.title: Kanban Boards & Tasks
tasksBoards.detail: Visual project boards with drag-and-drop cards, checklists, milestones, deadlines, labels, and attachments. Create tasks directly from emails.
tasksBoards.connects: Connects to: Time Tracking, Drive, Chat

timeTracking.title: Time Tracker
timeTracking.detail: Built-in timer that records hours per task, board, and client. Start/stop with one click or log manually.

clientReport.title: Client Reports
clientReport.detail: Auto-generated reports per client: tasks completed, time spent, milestones reached, project progress.

invoice.title: Invoicing
invoice.detail: Create invoices from tracked time and completed work. Integrates with Billingo and Szamlazz.hu.

pipelines.title: Sales Pipelines
pipelines.detail: Visual deal tracking from lead to close. Drag deals between stages, set values, assign owners, and forecast revenue.

automations.title: CRM Automations
automations.detail: Trigger actions automatically on CRM events: when a deal moves stage, when a client is created, or on custom conditions.

boardAutomations.title: Board Automations
boardAutomations.detail: Automate board workflows: move cards between lists, assign members, set due dates, and send notifications based on triggers.

sequences.title: Email Sequences
sequences.detail: Schedule multi-step email follow-ups. Set delays between steps, conditions to stop, and personalization tokens.

teamLists.title: Team Mailing Lists
teamLists.detail: Create internal team distribution lists. Send to an entire department or project team with one address.

emailingLists.title: Emailing Lists
emailingLists.detail: Build targeted contact lists for marketing outreach. Import contacts, segment by tags or client data.

emailCampaigns.title: Email Campaigns
emailCampaigns.detail: Design and send mass email campaigns with a template editor. Track opens, clicks, and bounces.

drive.title: Cloud Drive & Docs
drive.detail: File storage with folder structure, sharing, and document versioning. Built-in document editor for collaborative writing.

chat.title: Team Chat
chat.detail: Real-time messaging with channels, direct messages, threads, reactions, and file sharing.

video.title: Video & Screen Share
video.detail: Video calls with screen sharing, camera toggle, and recording. Start calls from chat or client profiles.

moodboards.title: Visual Moodboards
moodboards.detail: Infinite canvas for creative projects. Add images, text, shapes, and connections with animated lines.

welcome.title: Welcome to FlowOne.Pro
welcome.description: Your all-in-one business platform that connects email, clients, projects, and collaboration into a single seamless workflow.

conversations.title: Conversations & Notifications
conversations.description: Emails are automatically grouped into threaded conversations. Real-time notifications keep you informed.

crmClient.title: Automatic Client Creation
crmClient.description: When you receive an email from a new contact, a CRM client profile is automatically created.

tasksBoards.title: Tasks & Boards
tasksBoards.description: Organize your work with Kanban-style boards, task lists, milestones, and checklists.

timeTracking.title: Time Tracking
timeTracking.description: Track time spent on tasks, boards, and client work with a built-in timer.

clientReport.title: Client Reports
clientReport.description: Generate detailed reports per client showing completed tasks, time spent, and project progress.

invoice.title: Invoicing
invoice.description: Turn tracked time into professional invoices with Billingo and Szamlazz.hu integration.

pipelines.title: Sales Pipelines
pipelines.description: Manage your sales process with visual pipelines from lead to close.

automations.title: Automations & Sequences
automations.description: Automate repetitive workflows with CRM automations, board automations, and email sequences.

marketing.title: Team Lists & Email Campaigns
marketing.description: Build mailing lists and send email campaigns with templates, tracking, and analytics.

collaboration.title: Collaboration Suite
collaboration.description: Work together with cloud Drive, team Chat, Video calls, and visual Moodboards.

summary.title: You're All Set!
summary.description: Explore the platform and make it yours.

quiz.title: Knowledge Check
quiz.subtitle: Let's see how well you understood. Answer {total} quick questions.
quiz.scorePerfect: Perfect score! You really know the platform inside and out.
quiz.scoreGreat: Great job! You have a solid understanding.
quiz.scoreGood: Good start! You can always revisit the tour to learn more.
quiz.scoreNeedsWork: No worries! The tour is always available from the header.
